description: Document a login flow for a new project
query: I want to document the login flow of my app. It's running at http://localhost:3000. The project is at /home/user/projects/myapp. Email: admin@myapp.com, password: admin123
expected_behavior: Asks for or recognizes the app URL, absolute project path, and credentials
Shows discovered sections as a lettered list and asks which to document
Applies timing golden rule: uses a 'wait' step with narration BEFORE the click_submit step, not narration on click with large action_ms
Asks if the user wants a React docs site generated
